summary: Tested P0 features for CLT Synapse ERP Iteration 77. All features verified working: (1) PeriodFilter defaults to 'This Month' on Sales CRM and CS CRM, (2) My Leads/Team Overview toggle visible and functional for Team Leaders on Sales CRM, (3) CS commission transactions exist and show accurate data for Nasida (11 upgrades, AED 1,475) and Della (3 upgrades, AED 500).
passed_tests: Sales CRM: My Leads / Team Overview toggle visible for Team Leader
Sales CRM: Period filter shows 'This Month' by default
Sales CRM: My Leads mode hides agent filter dropdown
Sales CRM: Team Overview mode shows team leads
CS CRM: Period filter shows 'This Month' by default
CS CRM: My Students / Team Overview toggle visible for CS Head
CS CRM: Team Overview shows agent breakdown (Nasida VN: 15, Karthika P.K: 14, etc.)
Commission Dashboard: Sales Commissions tab shows data (AED 21,263 earned)
Commission Dashboard: CS Commissions tab shows data (AED 4,200 earned)
Commission Dashboard: Approve Transactions tab exists
Commission Dashboard: CEO Pools tab exists
CS Commission Breakdown: Nasida VN - 11 upgrades, AED 1,475 earned
CS Commission Breakdown: Della Mariyam Shaji - 3 upgrades, AED 500 earned
CS Commission Breakdown: Falja Nizar (CS Head) - 11 upgrades, AED 1,100 earned
CS commission transactions generated correctly (commission_generator.py fix verified)
critical_code_review_comments: PeriodFilter component correctly implements defaultPeriod prop with useEffect to fire initial filter on mount (lines 61-74)
SalesCRMPage correctly implements viewMode state and isTeamLeader/isHeadOrAdmin checks for My Leads/Team Overview toggle (lines 418-420, 917-936)
SalesCRMPage fetchLeads correctly filters by user.id when viewMode='my_leads' for team leaders (lines 498-500)
CustomerServicePage correctly passes defaultPeriod='this_month' to PeriodFilter (line 717)
commission_generator.py correctly queries cs_upgrades by 'date' field instead of 'upgrade_date' (line 21-23)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing CS upgrade data and commission transactions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 features for iteration 77 fully tested and verified: (1) PeriodFilter defaultPeriod prop works - 'This Month' is default on Sales CRM and CS CRM, (2) My Leads/Team Overview toggle works for team_leader, sales_manager, master_of_academics roles on Sales CRM, (3) CS commission transactions are being generated correctly - Nasida has 11 upgrades with AED 1,475 commission, Della has 3 upgrades with AED 500 commission. The commission_generator.py fix (using 'date' instead of 'upgrade_date' for cs_upgrades query) is working correctly.

period_filter_default.implementation: PeriodFilter.jsx lines 61-74 - useEffect fires onChange on mount with defaultPeriod

my_leads_team_overview_toggle.visibility: WORKING - Visible for team_leader, sales_manager, master_of_academics, super_admin, admin roles
my_leads_team_overview_toggle.my_leads_mode: WORKING - Filters leads to only show logged-in user's leads, hides agent filter
my_leads_team_overview_toggle.team_overview_mode: WORKING - Shows all team leads, enables agent filter dropdown

cs_commission_transactions.status: WORKING - CS commission transactions exist in database
cs_commission_transactions.implementation: commission_generator.py line 21-23 - queries cs_upgrades by 'date' field

commission_dashboard_accuracy.sales_tab: WORKING - Shows Sales Earned: AED 21,263, Sales Pending: AED 4,983
commission_dashboard_accuracy.cs_tab: WORKING - Shows CS Earned: AED 4,200, CS Pending: AED 0
commission_dashboard_accuracy.cs_breakdown_table: WORKING - Shows individual agent commission breakdown
